top_findings.summary: The skill "mini-app-requirements" is designed to define requirements for mini apps, but it includes actions such as automatically calling a "status-updater" subagent to update project status and triggering other skills (e.g., "mini-app-design") based on conditions without explicit user command for those phases. While skip conditions exist, these actions are not necessary for the core task of requirement definition and represent an overreach into workflow management, potentially leading to unintended progression in the development process.
